positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a majestic lunar fox (kitsune) surrounded by glowing geometric flora and celestial elements. The fox has a sophisticated, confident pose, facing slightly to the viewer. Composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring bold outlines, clean flat colors with holographic gradients, and high contrast silhouettes against a deep indigo and cosmic purple background. Incorporate subtle mandala-like patterns and clean star trails. Artwork must be vector-like, highly stylized, suitable for screen printing on apparel, with perfect symmetry and clean edges.
